══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Merfolk — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Merfolk — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Merfolk — Iron Concentration HP: 54/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Merfolk — Iron Concentration HP: 38/67
--- Merfolk — Iron Concentration --- HP: 38/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

--- Merfolk — Iron Concentration --- HP: 18/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
